ogTitle: Broughams Gate vs Broughton: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Broughams Gate and Broughton.
heading: Broughams Gate vs Broughton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Broughams Gate, New South Wales and Broughton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Broughams Gate has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Broughton (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Broughams Gate or Broughton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Broughams Gate has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Broughton scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Broughams Gate scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Broughton scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Broughams Gate or Broughton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Broughams Gate has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
